_doc: Real-crypto fixture. The basic-p2pkh ANF asserts (a) hash160(pubKey) == constructor pubKeyHash, and (b) checkSig(sig, pubKey) verifies against the supplied sighash. Both predicates pass: pubKey is the secp256k1 compressed pubkey for the deterministic test priv key aa11..eeff, hash160 of which is e00a..9d47; sig is the canonical low-S DER signature produced by RFC 6979 ECDSA-sign(sighash, priv) — the digest is the sighash itself, no extra hash, matching the on-chain CHECKSIG semantic. sighash = sha256("runar-sdk-anf-real-crypto-test").
